untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 'EPS growth rate > 10% YoY' — fundamental metric not in allowed indicator list; (2) 'Stock price underperformance vs. sector > 2%' — requires sector relative comparison, not available; (3) 'Broad market showing technical reversal signals (higher lows, tightening range)' — pattern recognition not expressible with allowed operators; (4) 'Position sizing inversely correlated to VIX' — position sizing logic cannot be expressed in entry/exit rules. Best approximation uses returns as proxy for earnings growth and india_vix for volatility context, but does not capture the full signal logic.
translation_notes: Attempted translation: Used log_returns as proxy for YoY earnings growth (10% → 0.10 decimal scale), constrained returns < 0.02 to model underperformance/dormancy, and india_vix > 15 to approximate elevated uncertainty regime. However, this is fundamentally incomplete—the signal requires fundamental data (EPS), sector-relative metrics, and pattern recognition that are unavailable in the allowed indicator set. The scale-out logic (thirds at +15%, +30%, +50%) cannot be expressed in entry/exit rule syntax and requires separate position management rules.
